description_long: This is a robust axe featuring a thick, rectangular metal head with a flat poll and a slightly curved cutting edge. The blade is forged from dark, heavy metal, showing a matte, slightly rough finish with visible wear and subtle textural variations. The handle is made from natural wood, displaying a pronounced curvature for ergonomic grip and a visibly textured, unfinished surface. The wood grain is prominent, and the handle tapers slightly towards the end, enhancing control and comfort during use. The head is securely mounted onto the handle using a traditional wedged fit, with no visible fasteners or modern attachments. This axe is utilitarian in design, suitable for heavy-duty tasks such as splitting wood or demolition in urban maintenance or construction settings.
description: A sturdy axe with a thick, dark metal head and a curved, textured wooden handle, designed for heavy-duty urban tasks. The blade is broad and flat, while the handle shows natural wood grain and ergonomic shaping.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe, highlighting the thick metal head and the pronounced curve of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow edge of the blade and the oval cross-section of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, but with the handle's curvature and wood grain more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat poll of the axe head and the end of the handle, emphasizing the mounting point.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with visible grain, oval cross-section, and a rough, unfinished texture for enhanced grip.
attribute_blade_design: Thick, rectangular steel blade with a single straight cutting edge and a flat poll; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fit with the blade head mounted onto the wooden handle.
